title: Morning at the Market in Manchester
synopsis: A lively market in Manchester fills the air with voices, colour, and the smell of fresh food.
sentences: Farah visited a busy market in Manchester with her older brother.
From the moment they arrived, she heard voices calling out prices and greetings.
Stalls stood in long rows, covered with fruit, bread, flowers, and warm food.
One seller arranged bright oranges into a neat tower.
Another chopped herbs so quickly that Farah stopped to watch.
Her brother bought a fresh loaf of bread and a small bag of apples.
Farah chose a honey cake from a bakery stall near the corner.
Steam rose from cups of coffee as people moved past with shopping bags.
The market felt noisy, but not in an unpleasant way.
It felt alive, like a place where everybody had come to begin the day together.
Before leaving, Farah turned back to look at the colours one more time.
She decided that markets were one of the best ways to learn a city.
